titleStmt.title: SII 29.102: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 102. (A.R. No. B. 574 of 1961-62.) KURAḌI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab kept in the Īśvara temple. [No. 2].

It states that mahāpradhāna daṇḍanāyaka Niṁbaṇayya made a grant of land at agrahāra Ṟaṟāvi to Nāgaladēvi, wife of Śankarārya, as a present (baḷuvaḷi). Half of that land was made over by Nāgaladēvi to the temples of Sankarēśvara and Nāgēśvara at agrahāra Rūḍi probably built by her. Mention is made of mahāmaṇḍḷēśvara kumāra Tailapadeva. At the beginning the record has an eulogy of Nāgaladēvi.
It is dated in the regnal year 12 (of Bhūlōkamalla-Somēśvara III), Pingaḷa, [Śaka 1059] Pushya, śu. 11. Friday, uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti corresponding to 1137 A.D., December 24, Friday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatsaneṁba riṣiya lasadvaṁśadoḷogedu gōtra maṁḍana nese
daṁ śrīvatsapadavi śrutabhāvaṁ sōmēśvaraṁ mahākābyadhīraṁ
Ātanaputraṁ vinaya vinūtaṁ caṁdrātapāvadātayaśa ssaṁpū
taṁ samagra vidyānvitaṁ śutyartthavēdidēvarasākhya tadanujanaśēṣa vidyāsadanaṁ
vibhu śaṁkarāryyanātana tammaṁ vidita sakaḷāgamā
rtthaṁ sadamaḷatara kīrtti negaḷdanī mahādēva . hariya viśāḷa vakṣamana
ḷaṁ karisirdda sarōjavāsegaṁ girīśana dēhabhāgamanaḷaṁkarisirdda nagātma jāte
gaṁ surapatiyaṁka pīṭha manaḷaṁkarisirddā puḻōma puttigaṁ
dore vibhuśaṁkarāryyana manappriye nāgaladēvi peṁpinoḷ .
manu cāritrayenippa saduguṇe mahādēvigaṁ puṇyabhā
jana niṁbaprabhuge mahōtsavadiṁ lakṣmīdēvivolu puṭṭi viṣṇu(dē)
(vaṁ) śrīmahādēvaneṁbana viśāḷōra sthaḷasthāyiyāda navadyaṁ
(ṁ)ge gaṁgaṇabbegeṇeyāru viśvaṁbhārā bhāgadoḷu . doresuma
nege śāṁḍilyege sari sītege pāṭi saṁdarūḍhatigeṇe saccaritadoḷaṁ pa
tibhaktiyu pariṇatiyoḷamendoḍuḷidarā vadhugeṇeye . natari
pu bhūpanūtnamaṇimauḷi mayūkha navaprasūna raṁjita pāda
paṁkajaṁ draviḷa vipravarāḷige vikramāṁka bhūpati paḍedittanu
ttamikeyiṁ negaḷdayyaṇavāḍi nāḷdaḷaṁkritiyenesaṁda rūḍi
yanadaṁ sale sarbbanamasya māgiralu . svasti samasta
bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatsa
rvvajña cakravarti bhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka tāraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇa
purada nelavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge
yyuttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanma
hāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kumāraṁ tailapadēvaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ
daṁḍanāyakaṁ nimbaṇayyaṁgaḷu mānāḍu nāgaladēvige baḷavaḷiyāga tailapadēva
rgge sarvvanamasyadagrahāraṁ ṟauṟāviyali Ondu vrittiyaṁ koṭṭaru . Ā vṛtti
yoḷagarddhā vṛttiyaṁ baḷisahitaṁ nāgaladēvi mānyada Agrahāraṁ rūḍiya
lmāḍisida śaṁkadēśvara dēvarggaṁ nāgēśvara dēvarggavāgi śrīmaccāḷukya sarvvajña
cakravartti bhūlōkamalla varṣada 12 neya piṁgaḷa saṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha 11
śukravāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇadandu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭaḷu .About 10 lines of writing after this are completely chopped off. Big sketch of a very prominently.
Digital edition of SII 29.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
